assistant:
```plaintext
- Fix suggestion 1: The declaration sections for VAR_INPUT, VAR_OUTPUT, and VAR need to be properly terminated with a semicolon (;) or a colon (:) as per IEC 61131-3 syntax rules.
- Fix suggestion 2: Ensure that the FUNCTION_BLOCK declaration is correctly formatted and that all variable declarations are properly structured.

(1)
<code_segment>
FUNCTION_BLOCK hf_9
VAR_INPUT
    sortDirection : BOOL; // FALSE for ascending, TRUE for descending
    arr : ARRAY[1..1000] OF DINT; // Input array to be sorted
END_VAR_INPUT

VAR_OUTPUT
    error : BOOL; // TRUE if an error occurred, FALSE otherwise
    status : WORD; // Status code
    sorted_arr : ARRAY[1..1000] OF DINT; // Output sorted array
END_VAR_OUTPUT

VAR
    i, j, gap : INT; // Loop variables
    temp : DINT; // Temporary variable for swapping
END_VAR
</code_segment>
<patch>
FUNCTION_BLOCK hf_9
VAR_INPUT
    sortDirection : BOOL; // FALSE for ascending, TRUE for descending
    arr : ARRAY[1..1000] OF DINT; // Input array to be sorted
END_VAR_INPUT;

VAR_OUTPUT
    error : BOOL; // TRUE if an error occurred, FALSE otherwise
    status : WORD; // Status code
    sorted_arr : ARRAY[1..1000] OF DINT; // Output sorted array
END_VAR_OUTPUT;

VAR
    i, j, gap : INT; // Loop variables
    temp : DINT; // Temporary variable for swapping
END_VAR;
</patch>
```

assistant:
```plaintext
- Fix suggestion 1: The semicolon (;) at the end of the VAR_INPUT and VAR_OUTPUT sections should be removed. According to IEC 61131-3 syntax rules, these sections should end with the keyword END_VAR_INPUT or END_VAR_OUTPUT without a semicolon.
- Fix suggestion 2: Ensure that the FUNCTION_BLOCK declaration is correctly formatted and that all variable declarations are properly structured.

(1)
<code_segment>
FUNCTION_BLOCK hf_9
VAR_INPUT
    sortDirection : BOOL; // FALSE for ascending, TRUE for descending
    arr : ARRAY[1..1000] OF DINT; // Input array to be sorted
END_VAR_INPUT;

VAR_OUTPUT
    error : BOOL; // TRUE if an error occurred, FALSE otherwise
    status : WORD; // Status code
    sorted_arr : ARRAY[1..1000] OF DINT; // Output sorted array
END_VAR_OUTPUT;

VAR
    i, j, gap : INT; // Loop variables
    temp : DINT; // Temporary variable for swapping
END_VAR;
</code_segment>
<patch>
FUNCTION_BLOCK hf_9
VAR_INPUT
    sortDirection : BOOL; // FALSE for ascending, TRUE for descending
    arr : ARRAY[1..1000] OF DINT; // Input array to be sorted
END_VAR_INPUT

VAR_OUTPUT
    error : BOOL; // TRUE if an error occurred, FALSE otherwise
    status : WORD; // Status code
    sorted_arr : ARRAY[1..1000] OF DINT; // Output sorted array
END_VAR_OUTPUT

VAR
    i, j, gap : INT; // Loop variables
    temp : DINT; // Temporary variable for swapping
END_VAR
</patch>
```
